name: Baked Red Snapper Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix bread crumbs, grated cheese, and finely chopped mint leaves (optional) in a bowl.
2. Stuff the fish with the mixture, closing it and securing with toothpicks (s).
3. Grease a baking pan with one tablespoon of oil.
4. Place the stuffed fish in the pan, slit the fish on its underside.
5. In each slit, place 1 small piece of cheese, 1 onion slice, and 1 mint leaf.
6. Pour tomatoes over the fish.
7. Arrange 3 thin lemon slices on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, basting regularly.
9. Cover during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
